title: [InstCombine] Bail out on intrinsics with struct return types
author: dtcxzyw
description:
After https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/174835, overflow intrinsics can be vectorized. But `foldShuffledIntrinsicOperands` doesn't support shuffling vectors inside the struct return value.

Closes https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/176548.

comments.author: llvm-ci
